title: 2-Ingredient Pancakes
steps: Mash the bananas well in a bowl.
Whisk in the eggs until smooth.
Cook small spoonfuls on a lightly oiled pan, 2 min per side.

title: Quick Guacamole
steps: Mash the avocados in a bowl.
Stir in lime juice and salt.
Add onion if using, mix, and serve.

title: 5-Minute Garlic Butter Pasta
steps: Boil pasta until al dente, reserve 1/4 cup pasta water.
Melt butter, saute garlic 1 min until fragrant.
Toss pasta with garlic butter and a splash of pasta water.
Top with parmesan, salt, and pepper.

title: Classic Scrambled Eggs
steps: Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
Melt butter in a pan over low-medium heat.
Add eggs, stir gently and continuously until just set.
Remove from heat while still slightly soft.

title: Honey Mustard Dressing
steps: Whisk all ingredients together until smooth.
Adjust honey/mustard ratio to taste.
Store in the fridge for up to a week.

title: Simple Tomato Bruschetta
steps: Mix tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil, and salt in a bowl.
Let sit 10 minutes for flavors to combine.
Spoon onto toasted bread and serve.

title: One-Pan Fried Rice
steps: Scramble eggs in a hot pan, set aside.
Stir-fry veg for 2-3 minutes.
Add rice, breaking up clumps, fry 3-4 minutes.
Stir in eggs and soy sauce, toss to combine.

title: No-Bake Energy Bites
steps: Mix all ingredients in a bowl until combined.
Roll into small balls.
Chill in the fridge for at least 30 minutes.
